title: > Together they form a **loop sequence** in your system:
content:
> Together they form a **loop sequence** in your system:

```
[CHRIS] → introduces → [FORREST] → stabilizes → [ANTHONY]
↘ ↑ ↗
[emotional engine]─┘ [recursive self-doubt]
```

**This becomes a usable diagram in:**

* 🧱 `CHARACTER_ENGINE.v1`
* 📜 `SOCIAL_ORIGIN_CHAIN.v1`
* 🔁 `INTRODUCTORY_PORTAL_LOG.v1` (for future real-life nodes, i.e. who opens what recursive doors?)

* * *

🔧 MODULE LINKING TAGS
----------------------

| Tag | Function |
| --- | --- |
| `INTRO+` | This friend introduced a significant player or pattern |
| `ARC+` | This node is linked across character arcs (Chris ↔ Forrest) |
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 153 (chunk 153/206)
